title: Weather Today [31 March, 2026]: Check IMD Rain Predictions, Snow Alert, Thunderstorms & Heat Across Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Chennai, Karnataka, Rajasthan, Jammu, Hyderabad & More — Full City-Wise Forecast - The Sunday Guardian
full_text:
Weather Today, 31 March 2026: IMD predicts rain, thunderstorms & snowfall as a new Western Disturbance hits Northwest India. Check the full city-wise forecast for Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Chennai, Hyderabad, Rajasthan, Jammu & Kashmir, Karnataka, Punjab & more. Get live temperature, AQI & rain predictions.
Weather Today, 31 March 2026:
Northern hill regions including Jammu & Kashmir and Himachal Pradesh may witness light to moderate snowfall at higher altitudes. Rainfall is expected in lower valleys due to moisture laden winds and western disturbance activity and temperatures remain low, increasing the chances of fog and reduced visibility in mountainous areas.
North India is expected to experience fluctuating temperatures. Initial cooling of 2–4°C may occur due to rainfall and thunderstorms, followed by a gradual rise in temperatures. Hailstorms and gusty winds are also possible in isolated areas across Punjab, Haryana, Delhi and Uttar Pradesh.
Minimum: 23°C | Maximum: 35°C
Delhi-NCR will experience warm daytime conditions with mild winds and partly cloudy skies. Thunderstorm activity may develop later in the evening, bringing brief relief from rising temperatures. Air quality remains moderate but may worsen during peak afternoon hours.
Minimum: 26°C | Maximum: 33°C
Chennai is expected to remain humid with partly cloudy skies and thunderstorms accompanied by lightning may occur in isolated pockets. Coastal winds may provide mild relief from humidity.
Minimum: 27°C | Maximum: 29°C
Mumbai will see stable coastal weather conditions and humidity remains high with light sea breeze throughout the day. No significant rainfall is expected, though cloud cover may increase.
Minimum: 26°C | Maximum: 36°C
Hyderabad will experience hot daytime temperatures and thunderstorms may develop in the evening hours. Winds may increase slightly and bringing temporary cooling.
Minimum: 24°C | Maximum: 34°C
Parts of Karnataka may experience scattered thunderstorms where as bengaluru and nearby areas may witness cloudy skies with light rainfall and humidity remains moderate.
Minimum: 25°C | Maximum: 36°C
Lucknow and surrounding areas will experience rising temperatures with partly cloudy skies, thunderstorms and gusty winds may develop later in the day.
Minimum: 21°C | Maximum: 34°C
Jaipur and nearby areas will experience warm daytime weather. Winds may intensify in the afternoon and isolated thunderstorm activity is possible.
Minimum: 2°C | Maximum: 9°C
Srinagar may witness cold conditions with chances of snowfall at higher elevations and light rain may occur in valley areas with reduced visibility expected.
Minimum: 19°C | Maximum: 34°C
Chandigarh and surrounding areas may experience warm weather with chances of thunderstorms and winds may strengthen later in the day.
Minimum: 26°C | Maximum: 38°C
Ahmedabad will experience hot and dry weather conditions and heat levels may intensify during afternoon hours with clear skies.
Rising temperatures across central and western India may increase heat discomfort during afternoon hours. Cities like Ahmedabad, Hyderabad and Lucknow may experience heat stress and authorities advise staying hydrated and limiting outdoor exposure.
Delhi's AQI is expected to remain in the Moderate category and dust levels may rise due to dry winds, while evening humidity may slightly improve air quality.
AQI Scale Guide:
1. Are there any travel or safety warnings?
Thunderstorms and gusty winds may disrupt travel in northern and southern regions where travelers should check updates before departure.
2. Will temperatures rise across the country?
Yes, temperatures are expected to rise in central and western India, especially in Gujarat and Uttar Pradesh.
3. Will there be any rain today?
Yes, rainfall is expected in southern states and northern hills with isolated thunderstorms elsewhere.
4. Where will it snow today?
Higher regions of Jammu and Kashmir and Himachal Pradesh may receive snowfall.
5. Which cities will experience heat today?
Ahmedabad, Hyderabad, Lucknow and Delhi may experience warmer daytime conditions.
